I-1_Philosophical.notes: F from Google Ngrams English 'equity' normalized. P from intra-corpus cosine similarity.

I-4_Public_Policy.source: World Bank Documents API, n=500 docs, sentence-BERT
I-4_Public_Policy.notes: Strong P decline post-2015: equity used in increasingly heterogeneous contexts.

I-6_Social_Doctrine.KEY_FINDING: EQUITY ABSENT POST-1965. 0 occurrences of 'equity' in Vatican corpus after Gaudium et Spes (1965). I-6 operates on 'justice' (avg 10.15/10k words) not 'equity' (0.15/10k). Terminological decoupling is complete.

I-2_Legal_Positive.corpus: Harvard CAP API (requires token registration at case.law) + CourtListener

I-3_Social_Media.reason: No verified corpus without Twitter Academic API or Pushshift access
I-3_Social_Media.treatment_in_paper: Qualitative analysis, Section IV.D, with explicit methodological note
